---
title: "Definition: LogarithmicFunction"
---

<details>
<summary>Definition: Logarithmic Function</summary>

A **logarithmic function** is of the form $\log_b(x)$ where $b>0$ and $b \neq 1$.

Note: A logarithmic function is not an algebraic function.

</details>

<!-- include: Page.KeyCharacteristicsOfLogarithmicFunction -->
<!-- include: Page.PropertiesOfLogarithms -->
